title: hieracium murorum subsp. tenuiflorum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. tenuiflorum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. tenuiflorum are said to promote health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
